title: Can You Survive Without Bones?

scenes.text: Did you know there are jellyfish that are 95% water and have no bones?
Jellyfish have a simple body structure that allows them to thrive in oceans.
Some jellyfish have even been known to regenerate after injury, like starfish!
These creatures can live for years without bones!
scenes.label: LIFETIME WITHOUT BONES

scenes.text: Follow so you never run out of fun facts.

description: These incredible jellyfish can live and thrive without bones, showcasing nature's mysteries! Follow for daily facts!
